interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me which circuits were used in races along with the years they were hosted?
interactions.intention: Find circuits and the years they were used in races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME, FORMULA_1_RACES.YEAR FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES ON FORMULA_1_RACES.CIRCUITID = FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many circuits are there in each country and location?
interactions.intention: Count the number of circuits in each country and location.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS GROUP BY FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names and coordinates of circuits in Spain?
interactions.intention: Get the names and coordinates of circuits in Spain.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LAT, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LNG FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS WHERE FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY='Spain'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the points scored by each constructor in the constructor results?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the points scored by each constructor in the constructor results.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CONSTRUCTORID, POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the status of the constructors along with their points?
interactions.intention: Display the status of the constructors along with their points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CONSTRUCTORID, POINTS, STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructors have standings that match their results in terms of points?
interactions.intention: Find constructors with standings matching their results based on points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1C.CONSTRUCTORID, F1CR.POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS F1CR JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS F1C ON F1CR.CONSTRUCTORID = F1C.CONSTRUCTORID JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS F1CS ON F1C.CONSTRUCTORID = F1CS.CONSTRUCTORID WHERE F1CR.POINTS = F1CS.POINTS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many Formula 1 drivers are there for each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of Formula 1 drivers grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names of drivers from Germany?
interactions.intention: List the names of drivers who have German nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORENAME, SURNAME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS WHERE NATIONALITY = 'German';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the lap times for German drivers?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the lap times recorded by German drivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT L.RACEID, L.LAP, L.TIME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES L ON D.DRIVERID = L.DRIVERID WHERE D.NATIONALITY = 'German';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you give me the status description for each race result?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the status description associated with each race result.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1R.RESULTID, F1R.RACEID, F1R.DRIVERID, F1R.CONSTRUCTORID, F1S.STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS F1R JOIN FORMULA_1_STATUS F1S ON F1R.STATUSID = F1S.STATUSID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total number of points scored by each driver?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total points scored by each driver across all races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DRIVERID, SUM(POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS GROUP BY DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also include the description for the status of each driver’s race?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the total points scored by each driver along with the status description of their races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1R.DRIVERID, SUM(F1R.POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS, F1S.STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS F1R JOIN FORMULA_1_STATUS F1S ON F1R.STATUSID = F1S.STATUSID GROUP BY F1R.DRIVERID, F1S.STATUS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide details about the columns in the seasons data?
interactions.intention: Retrieve details about the columns present in the seasons table.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_TMDP.COLUMN_LABEL, FORMULA_1_TMDP.COLUMN_DESCRIPTION FROM FORMULA_1_TMDP WHERE FORMULA_1_TMDP.TABLE_ID = 'seasons'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many seasons are recorded in total?
interactions.intention: Count the total number of seasons recorded in the data.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR) FROM FORMULA_1_SEASONS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the seasons in descending order of their year?
interactions.intention: List all the recorded seasons sorted by the year in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR, FORMULA_1_SEASONS.URL FROM FORMULA_1_SEASONS ORDER BY FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many Formula 1 drivers are there grouped by their nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of Formula 1 drivers grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names of all drivers who are German?
interactions.intention: List the names of all Formula 1 drivers with German nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORENAME, SURNAME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS WHERE NATIONALITY = 'German'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the standings and points for the German drivers?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the standings and points for drivers with German nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, DS.POSITION, DS.POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_DRIVERSTANDINGS DS ON D.DRIVERID = DS.DRIVERID WHERE D.NATIONALITY = 'German'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many constructors are there for each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of constructors grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS GROUP BY FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all constructors from British nationality?
interactions.intention: Retrieve all constructors belonging to the British nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NAME, FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NATIONALITY FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS WHERE FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NATIONALITY = 'British'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the status of constructors who participated in races?
interactions.intention: Find the status of constructors who participated in races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NAME, FORMULA_1_STATUS.STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS JOIN FORMULA_1_RESULTS ON FORMULA_1_RESULTS.CONSTRUCTORID = FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.CONSTRUCTORID JOIN FORMULA_1_STATUS ON FORMULA_1_RESULTS.STATUSID = FORMULA_1_STATUS.STATUSID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the total points scored by constructors in the results?
interactions.intention: Find the total points scored by constructors.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructor has the highest total points in the results?
interactions.intention: Find the constructor with the highest total points by joining the constructor details.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, SUM(R.POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS R JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C ON R.CONSTRUCTORID = C.CONSTRUCTORID GROUP BY C.NAME ORDER BY TOTAL_POINTS DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the nationality of that constructor?
interactions.intention: Find the nationality of the constructor with the highest total points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS WHERE NAME = 'McLaren'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many constructors are there for each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the constructors grouped by nationality to understand their diversity.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS GROUP BY NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the constructors along with their standings?
interactions.intention: Retrieve constructors and their standings.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, C.NATIONALITY, CS.POINTS, CS.POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS CS ON C.CONSTRUCTORID = CS.CONSTRUCTORID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the constructors' qualifying results?
interactions.intention: Retrieve constructors and their qualifying results.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, Q.POSITION, Q.Q1, Q.Q2, Q.Q3 FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C JOIN FORMULA_1_QUALIFYING Q ON C.CONSTRUCTORID = Q.CONSTRUCTORID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the laptimes of Formula 1 drivers?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the laptimes of Formula 1 drivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1D.FORENAME, F1D.SURNAME, F1L.LAP, F1L.POSITION, F1L.TIME, F1L.MILLISECONDS FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS F1D JOIN FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES F1L ON F1D.DRIVERID = F1L.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many drivers are there from each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of drivers grouped by nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the pitstop details for drivers from the previous query?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the pitstop details for the drivers grouped by nationality from the previous query.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1D.FORENAME, F1D.SURNAME, F1P.STOP, F1P.LAP, F1P.TIME, F1P.DURATION FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS F1D JOIN FORMULA_1_PITSTOPS F1P ON F1D.DRIVERID = F1P.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me how many Formula 1 drivers there are grouped by their nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of Formula 1 drivers categorized by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the standings of drivers from each nationality?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the standings of drivers with their nationalities.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.NATIONALITY, DS.POSITION, DS.POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_DRIVERSTANDINGS DS ON D.DRIVERID = DS.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which drivers qualified in the top three positions, and what are their nationalities?
interactions.intention: Identify drivers who qualified in the top three positions and their nationalities.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, D.NATIONALITY, Q.POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_QUALIFYING Q ON D.DRIVERID = Q.DRIVERID WHERE Q.POSITION <= 3

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the lap times for each driver?
interactions.intention: Retrieve lap times for all drivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.DRIVERREF, D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, L.LAP, L.TIME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES L ON D.DRIVERID = L.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many drivers are there from each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count drivers grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which drivers participated in qualifying sessions, and what were their positions?
interactions.intention: Retrieve drivers who participated in qualifying sessions along with their positions.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.DRIVERREF, D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, Q.POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_QUALIFYING Q ON D.DRIVERID = Q.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which seasons are associated with different mappings in the system?
interactions.intention: Find the seasons associated with mappings.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.FROM_T, FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR FROM FORMULA_1_TMJMAP JOIN FORMULA_1_SEASONS ON FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.TO_T = CAST(FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR AS VARCHAR2(4000))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What about the races linked to constructor results through mappings?
interactions.intention: Find the races linked to constructor results.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.FROM_T, FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.RACEID FROM FORMULA_1_TMJMAP JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS ON FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.TO_T = CAST(FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.RACEID AS VARCHAR2(4000))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Show me the total points scored by constructors in all races.
interactions.intention: Find the total points scored by constructors in all races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the pit stop details for each driver?
interactions.intention: Retrieve pit stop details for each driver.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.DRIVERREF, P.STOP, P.LAP, P.TIME, P.DURATION FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_PITSTOPS P ON D.DRIVERID = P.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which drivers participated in the qualifying rounds?
interactions.intention: Find drivers who participated in the qualifying rounds.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT D.DRIVERREF FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_QUALIFYING Q ON D.DRIVERID = Q.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those drivers, can you list their qualifying positions?
interactions.intention: List qualifying positions for drivers who participated in qualifying rounds.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.DRIVERREF, Q.POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_QUALIFYING Q ON D.DRIVERID = Q.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me how many Formula 1 constructors exist for each nationality?
interactions.intention: Find the count of Formula 1 constructors grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) AS CONSTRUCTOR_COUNT FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS GROUP BY FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the details of constructors along with their standings points?
interactions.intention: Retrieve constructors and their standings points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NAME, FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NATIONALITY, FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS.POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS ON FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS.CONSTRUCTORID = FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.CONSTRUCTORID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Sort the constructors alphabetically by their name along with their nationalities.
interactions.intention: List all constructors sorted alphabetically by their names including nationalities.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NAME, FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NATIONALITY FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS ORDER BY FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NAME ASC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many circuits are there in each country and location?
interactions.intention: Count the number of circuits in each country and location.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS GROUP BY FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the list of races held at circuits in Malaysia?
interactions.intention: List the races held at circuits located in Malaysia.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_RACES.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_RACES JOIN FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS ON FORMULA_1_RACES.CIRCUITID = FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID WHERE FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY = 'Malaysia';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructors participated in those races?
interactions.intention: Find the constructors that participated in races held at circuits in Malaysia.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS ON FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS.CONSTRUCTORID = FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.CONSTRUCTORID JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES ON FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.RACEID = FORMULA_1_RACES.RACEID JOIN FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS ON FORMULA_1_RACES.CIRCUITID = FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID WHERE FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY = 'Malaysia';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the standings information for drivers, including their points and wins?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the standings information for drivers along with their points and wins.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, DS.POINTS, DS.WINS FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_DRIVERSTANDINGS DS ON D.DRIVERID = DS.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the lap times for these drivers in any race?
interactions.intention: Retrieve lap times for drivers in any race.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, L.LAP, L.TIME, L.MILLISECONDS FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES L ON D.DRIVERID = L.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the pit stop details for these drivers?
interactions.intention: Retrieve pit stop details for drivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, P.STOP, P.LAP, P.TIME, P.DURATION FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_PITSTOPS P ON D.DRIVERID = P.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the status of the results for all races?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the status descriptions for the results of all races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1R.RESULTID, F1R.RACEID, F1S.STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS F1R JOIN FORMULA_1_STATUS F1S ON F1R.STATUSID = F1S.STATUSID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which drivers scored the highest total points across all races?
interactions.intention: Aggregate the total points scored by each driver across all races and identify the highest scorers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1R.DRIVERID, SUM(F1R.POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS F1R GROUP BY F1R.DRIVERID ORDER BY TOTAL_POINTS DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which status is most common among the results of races from different seasons?
interactions.intention: Identify the most common status among the results of races across different seasons.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1S.STATUS, COUNT(*) AS STATUS_COUNT FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS F1R JOIN FORMULA_1_STATUS F1S ON F1R.STATUSID = F1S.STATUSID JOIN FORMULA_1_SEASONS F1SE ON F1R.RACEID = F1SE.YEAR GROUP BY F1S.STATUS ORDER BY STATUS_COUNT DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructors had the most wins in races along with the race names?
interactions.intention: Find the constructors with the most wins in races along with the race names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.CONSTRUCTORID, R.NAME, C.WINS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS C JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES R ON C.RACEID = R.RACEID WHERE C.WINS > 0 ORDER BY C.WINS DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those constructors, how many pit stops were made during those races?
interactions.intention: Find the number of pit stops made by constructors during the races they won.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.CONSTRUCTORID, R.NAME, COUNT(P.STOP) AS TOTAL_PITSTOPS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS C JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES R ON C.RACEID = R.RACEID JOIN FORMULA_1_PITSTOPS P ON R.RACEID = P.RACEID WHERE C.WINS > 0 GROUP BY C.CONSTRUCTORID, R.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were the qualifying positions for the constructors in those races?
interactions.intention: Find the qualifying positions for the constructors in the races they won.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.CONSTRUCTORID, R.NAME, Q.POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS C JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES R ON C.RACEID = R.RACEID JOIN FORMULA_1_QUALIFYING Q ON C.CONSTRUCTORID = Q.CONSTRUCTORID AND R.RACEID = Q.RACEID WHERE C.WINS > 0 ORDER BY Q.POSITION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many Formula 1 drivers are there grouped by their nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of Formula 1 drivers grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names of all drivers from Germany?
interactions.intention: List the names of all Formula 1 drivers from Germany.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORENAME, SURNAME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS WHERE NATIONALITY = 'German';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the lap times of German drivers in specific races?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the lap times of German drivers in specific races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT L.RACEID, L.LAP, L.POSITION, L.TIME, L.MILLISECONDS FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES L ON D.DRIVERID = L.DRIVERID WHERE D.NATIONALITY = 'German';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the standings with the highest points?
interactions.intention: Find the constructor standings entry with the highest points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT * FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS ORDER BY POINTS DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many wins does that constructor have?
interactions.intention: Find the number of wins for the constructor with the highest points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT WINS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS ORDER BY POINTS DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the name of the race where this constructor earned those points?
interactions.intention: Find the race name where the constructor with the highest points earned those points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM FORMULA_1_RACES WHERE RACEID = (SELECT RACEID FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS ORDER BY POINTS DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the circuits along with the race names they hosted?
interactions.intention: Retrieve circuits and the names of the races held at those circuits.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME, FORMULA_1_RACES.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES ON FORMULA_1_RACES.CIRCUITID = FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many circuits are there in each country and location?
interactions.intention: Count the number of circuits in each country and location.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS GROUP BY FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names of circuits that are located in a specific country, like Spain?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of circuits located in a specific country, such as Spain.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS WHERE FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY = 'Spain';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me how many Formula 1 drivers are there grouped by their nationality?
interactions.intention: Find the count of Formula 1 drivers grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_DRIVERS.NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY FORMULA_1_DRIVERS.NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Could you list the names of all drivers who are German?
interactions.intention: List the names of all Formula 1 drivers who are German.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_DRIVERS.FORENAME, FORMULA_1_DRIVERS.SURNAME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS WHERE FORMULA_1_DRIVERS.NATIONALITY = 'German'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the lap times for the German drivers?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the lap times for the German drivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES.LAP, FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES.TIME FROM FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES JOIN FORMULA_1_DRIVERS ON FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES.DRIVERID = FORMULA_1_DRIVERS.DRIVERID WHERE FORMULA_1_DRIVERS.NATIONALITY = 'German'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructors have standings and also participated in races?
interactions.intention: Find constructors that have both standings and race participations.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT C.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS CS ON C.CONSTRUCTORID = CS.CONSTRUCTORID JOIN FORMULA_1_RESULTS R ON C.CONSTRUCTORID = R.CONSTRUCTORID;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many constructors are there for each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of constructors grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS GROUP BY NATIONALITY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the constructors from British nationality?
interactions.intention: List the constructors who are from British nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, NATIONALITY FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS WHERE NATIONALITY = 'British';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total time taken for all laps by each driver?
interactions.intention: Find the total time taken for all laps by each driver.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DRIVERID, SUM(MILLISECONDS) AS TOTAL_TIME FROM FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES GROUP BY DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which driver had the fastest lap in terms of milliseconds?
interactions.intention: Identify the driver with the fastest lap based on milliseconds.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DRIVERID, MIN(MILLISECONDS) AS FASTEST_LAP_TIME FROM FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES GROUP BY DRIVERID ORDER BY FASTEST_LAP_TIME ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the name of the race where the fastest lap occurred?
interactions.intention: Find the name of the race where the fastest lap occurred.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT R.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES L JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES R ON L.RACEID = R.RACEID WHERE L.MILLISECONDS = (SELECT MIN(MILLISECONDS) FROM FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the total points scored by all constructors?
interactions.intention: Request the total points scored by all constructors.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POINTS) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructors are associated with the constructor results?
interactions.intention: Identify the constructors linked to the constructor results.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT C.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS CR JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C ON CR.CONSTRUCTORID = C.CONSTRUCTORID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the nationality of the constructor with the highest points?
interactions.intention: Find the nationality of the constructor who scored the most points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NATIONALITY FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS CR JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C ON CR.CONSTRUCTORID = C.CONSTRUCTORID WHERE CR.POINTS = (SELECT MAX(POINTS) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many circuits are there in each country and location?
interactions.intention: Count the number of circuits in each country and location.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, LOCATION, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS GROUP BY COUNTRY, LOCATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the coordinates of circuits located in Spain?
interactions.intention: Find the geographical coordinates of circuits in Spain.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, LAT, LNG FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS WHERE COUNTRY = 'Spain'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which races took place in circuits located in Spain?
interactions.intention: Find the races that took place in circuits located in Spain.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT R.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_RACES R JOIN FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS C ON R.CIRCUITID = C.CIRCUITID WHERE C.COUNTRY = 'Spain'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me how many circuits exist in each country and location?
interactions.intention: Find the number of circuits in each country and location.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS GROUP BY FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which circuits are located at an altitude greater than 500 meters?
interactions.intention: Find circuits that are at least 500 meters above sea level.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.ALT FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS WHERE FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.ALT > 500

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the list of all races that took place at these circuits?
interactions.intention: Find all races held at the circuits mentioned before.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_RACES.NAME, FORMULA_1_RACES.YEAR FROM FORMULA_1_RACES INNER JOIN FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS ON FORMULA_1_RACES.CIRCUITID = FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the lap times for each driver?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the lap times for all drivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.DRIVERREF, L.LAP, L.TIME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES L ON D.DRIVERID = L.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What about their pit stop durations?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the pit stop durations for all drivers.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.DRIVERREF, P.STOP, P.DURATION FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_PITSTOPS P ON D.DRIVERID = P.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many drivers are there for each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of drivers grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names and countries of circuits that have hosted races?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and countries of circuits associated with races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1_CIRCUITS.NAME, F1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS F1_CIRCUITS JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES F1_RACES ON F1_RACES.CIRCUITID = F1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructors participated in races held at those circuits?
interactions.intention: Find the constructors that participated in races held at the circuits listed earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT F1_CONSTRUCTORS.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS F1_CONSTRUCTORS JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS F1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS ON F1_CONSTRUCTORS.CONSTRUCTORID = F1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.CONSTRUCTORID JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES F1_RACES ON F1_RACES.RACEID = F1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.RACEID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the points scored by those constructors in those races?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the points scored by the constructors in the races held at the circuits mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT F1_CONSTRUCTORS.NAME, F1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS F1_CONSTRUCTORS JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS F1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS ON F1_CONSTRUCTORS.CONSTRUCTORID = F1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.CONSTRUCTORID JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES F1_RACES ON F1_RACES.RACEID = F1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.RACEID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the lap times of drivers along with their names?
interactions.intention: Retrieve lap times of drivers along with their names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, L.LAP, L.POSITION, L.TIME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES L ON D.DRIVERID = L.DRIVERID;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many drivers are there from each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of drivers grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: List the names of all British drivers.
interactions.intention: Get the names of all drivers with British nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORENAME, SURNAME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS WHERE NATIONALITY = 'British';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the total points scored by each driver across all races?
interactions.intention: Find the total points scored by each driver in all races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DRIVERID, SUM(POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS GROUP BY DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which teams do these drivers belong to, and what are their statuses?
interactions.intention: Find the teams and statuses of the drivers mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT R.DRIVERID, R.CONSTRUCTORID, S.STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS R INNER JOIN FORMULA_1_STATUS S ON R.STATUSID = S.STATUSID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also show me the drivers who completed more than 50 laps in a race?
interactions.intention: Retrieve drivers who completed more than 50 laps in any race.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DRIVERID, LAPS FROM FORMULA_1_RESULTS WHERE LAPS > 50

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the names of circuits and their corresponding statuses?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of circuits along with their statuses.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, S.STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS C JOIN FORMULA_1_RESULTS R ON C.CIRCUITID = R.RACEID JOIN FORMULA_1_STATUS S ON R.STATUSID = S.STATUSID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the descriptions of the circuits available in the database?
interactions.intention: Retrieve descriptions of circuits from the database.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, T.TABLE_DESCRIPTION FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS C JOIN FORMULA_1_TMDC T ON T.ID = 'circuits'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the circuit names and their mappings?
interactions.intention: Retrieve circuit names along with their mappings.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, T.TO_T FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS C JOIN FORMULA_1_TMJMAP T ON T.TO_T = 'FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the total points scored by all constructors?
interactions.intention: Provide the total points scored by all constructors.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructors have standings in the races and what are their points?
interactions.intention: List the constructors with standings in races along with their points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, CS.POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS CS ON C.CONSTRUCTORID = CS.CONSTRUCTORID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the highest position achieved by any constructor?
interactions.intention: Find the highest position achieved by any constructor.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MIN(POSITION) AS HIGHEST_POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many Formula 1 drivers are there for each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of Formula 1 drivers grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names of the drivers who are German?
interactions.intention: List the names of Formula 1 drivers who are German.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORENAME, SURNAME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS WHERE NATIONALITY = 'German'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the lap times for Nico Rosberg?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the lap times for Nico Rosberg.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT L.LAP, L.TIME FROM FORMULA_1_LAPTIMES L JOIN FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D ON L.DRIVERID = D.DRIVERID WHERE D.FORENAME = 'Nico' AND D.SURNAME = 'Rosberg'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many circuits are there in each country and location?
interactions.intention: Count the number of circuits grouped by their country and location.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION, COUNT(*) AS CIRCUIT_COUNT FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS GROUP BY FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.COUNTRY, FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.LOCATION

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show the circuits that are associated with their corresponding race results?
interactions.intention: Find circuits and their associated race results.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME, FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS ON FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS.RACEID = FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the circuits connected to their metadata descriptions?
interactions.intention: Retrieve circuits along with their metadata descriptions.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME, FORMULA_1_TMDC.TABLE_DESCRIPTION FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS JOIN FORMULA_1_TMDC ON FORMULA_1_TMDC.ID = 'circuits'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the circuit names along with the corresponding season years?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names of circuits and the years of the seasons they are associated with.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME, FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS INNER JOIN FORMULA_1_TMJMAP ON FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.FROM_T = 'FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID' INNER JOIN FORMULA_1_SEASONS ON FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.TO_T = 'FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the descriptions of the tables that contain information about circuits?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the descriptions of the tables that store information about circuits.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_TMDC.TABLE_DESCRIPTION FROM FORMULA_1_TMDC WHERE FORMULA_1_TMDC.ID = 'circuits'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the circuit names, their associated season years, and the mapping details?
interactions.intention: Retrieve circuit names, their corresponding season years, and the mapping information.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.NAME, FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR, FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.ID FROM FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS INNER JOIN FORMULA_1_TMJMAP ON FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.FROM_T = 'FORMULA_1_CIRCUITS.CIRCUITID' INNER JOIN FORMULA_1_SEASONS ON FORMULA_1_TMJMAP.TO_T = 'FORMULA_1_SEASONS.YEAR'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which years had constructor results and their related descriptions?
interactions.intention: Find the years that had constructor results and their related descriptions.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.YEAR, T.TABLE_DESCRIPTION FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS C JOIN FORMULA_1_SEASONS S ON S.YEAR = C.RACEID JOIN FORMULA_1_TMDC T ON T.ID = 'constructorResults'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: From those years, which one had the highest number of points scored?
interactions.intention: Find the year with the highest points scored from the previous result.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.YEAR, MAX(C.POINTS) AS MAX_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS C JOIN FORMULA_1_SEASONS S ON S.YEAR = C.RACEID GROUP BY S.YEAR ORDER BY MAX_POINTS DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which constructors participated in that year?
interactions.intention: List the constructors who participated in the year with the highest points scored.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT C.CONSTRUCTORID FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS C JOIN FORMULA_1_SEASONS S ON S.YEAR = C.RACEID WHERE S.YEAR = (SELECT S.YEAR FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS C JOIN FORMULA_1_SEASONS S ON S.YEAR = C.RACEID GROUP BY S.YEAR ORDER BY MAX(C.POINTS) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the total points scored by each constructor?
interactions.intention: Find the total points scored by each constructor.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CONSTRUCTORID, SUM(POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS GROUP BY CONSTRUCTORID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the constructors who scored more than 10 points?
interactions.intention: Find the constructors who scored more than 10 points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CONSTRUCTORID FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS GROUP BY CONSTRUCTORID HAVING SUM(POINTS) > 10

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and nationalities of these constructors?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and nationalities of the constructors who scored more than 10 points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, C.NATIONALITY FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORRESULTS CR JOIN FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C ON CR.CONSTRUCTORID = C.CONSTRUCTORID GROUP BY C.NAME, C.NATIONALITY HAVING SUM(CR.POINTS) > 10

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me which drivers have participated in races and their corresponding positions?
interactions.intention: Find drivers along with their positions in races.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT D.FORENAME, D.SURNAME, R.POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS D JOIN FORMULA_1_RESULTS R ON D.DRIVERID = R.DRIVERID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many drivers are there from each nationality?
interactions.intention: Count the number of drivers grouped by nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS GROUP BY NATIONALITY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the names of all German drivers?
interactions.intention: List all drivers' names who are German.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT FORENAME, SURNAME FROM FORMULA_1_DRIVERS WHERE NATIONALITY = 'German'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many points does the constructor with the most wins have?
interactions.intention: Find the points of the constructor with the most wins.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS ORDER BY WINS DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For the constructors with the most wins, which race did they win in?
interactions.intention: Find the races won by the constructor with the most wins.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT R.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS C JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES R ON C.RACEID = R.RACEID WHERE C.WINS = (SELECT MAX(WINS) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What position did that constructor hold in the standings?
interactions.intention: Find the position of the constructor in the standings.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS WHERE WINS = (SELECT MAX(WINS) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me how many constructors there are for each nationality?
interactions.intention: Find the number of constructors grouped by their nationality.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NATIONALITY, COUNT(*) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS GROUP BY NATIONALITY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the results of constructors along with the status information?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the results of constructors and their corresponding status information.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.NAME, C.NATIONALITY, R.POSITION, S.STATUS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS C JOIN FORMULA_1_RESULTS R ON C.CONSTRUCTORID = R.CONSTRUCTORID JOIN FORMULA_1_STATUS S ON R.STATUSID = S.STATUSID;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all constructors sorted alphabetically by their names along with their nationalities?
interactions.intention: List constructors alphabetically by name with their nationalities.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, NATIONALITY FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORS ORDER BY NAME ASC;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the total points and wins of all constructors?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the total points and wins for all constructors.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POINTS) AS TOTAL_POINTS, SUM(WINS) AS TOTAL_WINS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For which races do we have constructor standings data?
interactions.intention: Find the races that have constructor standings data available.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT R.NAME FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS C JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES R ON C.RACEID = R.RACEID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the position text of the constructors with the highest points?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the position text of the constructors with the highest points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POSITIONTEXT FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS WHERE POINTS = (SELECT MAX(POINTS) FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS)
